## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `ci:`, `build:`, `perf:`)
- [ ] One logical change
- [ ] Linked to a section of the design spec
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` is green locally
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] No personal data, real secrets, or proprietary info in the diff
